sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11323" key="a(paloplo/kamos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁπᾰλο-πλόκᾰμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11323.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with soft tentacles,</tr_> of cuttlefish, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
